first_2_records.paper_title: Specific profiles of perfluorinated compounds in surface and drinking waters and accumulation in mussels, fish, and dolphins from southeastern Brazil

records.paper_title: Specific profiles of perfluorinated compounds in surface and drinking waters and accumulation in mussels, fish, and dolphins from southeastern Brazil
records.location: Rio de Janeiro State, southeast Brazil
records.location_original: Rio de Janeiro State in southeast Brazil; drinking water from various districts in the State
records.evidence_snippet: PFOS, PFOA, and PFHxS were detected in all drinking water samples in concentration ranges of 0.58–6.70, 0.35–2.82, and 0.15–1.00 ng L 1, respectively.
records.notes: 摘要中报告为所有饮用水样品的浓度范围；未给出各区(district)的单点数据或采样时间。

records.paper_title: Specific profiles of perfluorinated compounds in surface and drinking waters and accumulation in mussels, fish, and dolphins from southeastern Brazil
records.location: Guanabara Bay, State of Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
records.evidence_snippet: Elevated concentrations of PFUnDA (mean: 109 ± 17.4 ng g 1 wet weight) were found in mussels from certain locations within Guanabara Bay.
records.notes: 摘要中报告为部分地点贻贝(mussels)的均值±标准差；未给出具体采样点名称与样本量。

first_2_records.notes: 本地PDF仅1页（摘要与引言开头），未包含正文表格/图或补充表，因此可提取的环境浓度记录仅来自摘要中的显式数值。
